name: Castleton Rec.
description: Located at the former Castleton Village School
fees: Members only — Contact Castleton Recreation Dept.

name: Johnson Rec Center
description: Note: Food/ Drink, Locker Rooms, and Water Fountain are only available while the pool house is open (typically mid-June through Mid-August). There is a porta-pot available for use June-October. The Town Office and Library are within a short walking distance for water and bathrooms during their normal operating hours.

name: Johnson Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Johnson Recreation Center in Killington, VT! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Monsignor Thomas Connor Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Monsignor Thomas Connor Memorial Park in Rutland, VT! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Northwood Park
description: All levels are welcome. Use playtime scheduler to sign up.

name: Pittsford Recreation Area
description: Pittsford Recreation Area is a place to play pickleball in Pittsford, VT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Rutland Racquet Club LLC
description: Rutland Racquet Club LLC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rutland, VT. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, lights, locker rooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Rutland Recreation Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Rutland Recreation Community Center in Rutland, VT! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Tinmouth CC
description: Tinmouth CC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wallingford, VT. There is 1 indoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Vermont Police Academy
description: Come play pickleball at Vermont Police Academy in Pittsford, VT! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Vermont Sport & Fitness Club
description: Vermont Sport & Fitness Club is a place to play pickleball in Rutland, VT. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Wallingford Court
description: Wallingford Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wallingford, VT. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Wells Courts
description: Courts are located behind the Wells Village School. The courts are first come first serve. All levels are welcome.
